# Extra Python packages for `experiments/robot/aloha` after the base install in README:
#   pip install torch==2.2.0 torchvision==0.17.0 torchaudio==2.2.0
#   pip install -e .
#   pip install packaging ninja
#   pip install "flash-attn==2.5.5" --no-build-isolation
#
# Most training dependencies are already covered by the commands above.
# This file only keeps the ALOHA-specific extras that are still needed.

# Required by the msgpack HTTP client used in fake/real eval clients.
msgpack
msgpack-numpy

# Required by real-world ALOHA eval modules importing `real_env.py`.
dm-env
ipython

# Optional but recommended if you want rollout videos from `save_rollout_video()`.
imageio[ffmpeg]

# Not installable from pip here; these must come from your ROS / robot environment:
#   rospy
#   cv_bridge
#   std_msgs
#   sensor_msgs
#   nav_msgs
#   geometry_msgs
#   interbotix_xs_modules
#   interbotix_xs_msgs
